T0147.title: Card Deduction
T0147.definition: A card-not-present debit method that allows a transaction to be completed using only the cardholder's bank account number, name, ID number, phone number, and SMS verification code.
T0147.description: A card-not-present debit method that allows a transaction to be completed using only the cardholder's bank account number, name, ID number, phone number, and SMS verification code.
T0147.usageExample: 他点了个链接填了信息，卡扣就发生了，卡里钱被分三笔转走，银行发来短信才知道。
